docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOCI, ANDREA E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RELIANA, ASAP CLEANERS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RELIANA, ASAP CLEANERS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RELIANA, ASAP CLEANERS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOCI, ANDREA E. AS TO DEFENDANT RELIANA, ASAP CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
